nagaa.name: Atmosphere-Pro
nagaa.description: Atmosphère is a work-in-progress customized firmware for the Nintendo Switch.

latest_release.body:
This is an UNOFFICIAL, UNSUPPORT Atmosphere fork. Do not report any issues with this to Atmosphere maintainers

- Support for booting from eMMC
  - Fusee will check for a FAT32 filesystem on eMMC BOOT1 (at 1MB offset), eMMC BOOT1 (at 0MB offset), and eMMC GPP partition, any SD card partition. It will pick the first one it finds that does not have a .no_boot_storage file in the root directory
- Support for emuSD
  - Allows redirecting all SD accesses in HOS to a separate file or partition on the SD card or eMMC. Note: HOS will crash, if no physical SD card is inserted
  - emuSD configuration is read from /emusd/emusd.ini with the following format:
```
[emusd]
enabled=[1 for SD card | 4 for eMMC]
sector=[start sector of emuSD partition]
path=[path to emusd file]
```
- For eMMC file based emuSD, the file is read from the first available FAT32 partition on eMMC
- Support for emuMMC on eMMC
  - Allows creating file or partition based emuMMC on the eMMC
  - emuMMC configuration is read from /emummc/emummc.ini with the following format:
```
[emummc]
enabled=[1 for SD card | 4 for eMMC]
sector=[start sector of emuMMC partition]
path=[path to emuMMC file]
nintendo_path=[path to Nintendo folder]
id=[emuMMC id]
```
- For eMMC file based emuMMC, the file is read from the first available FAT32 partition on eMMC

nagaa.name: EOS-Pro
nagaa.description: Nintendo Switch - Overclocking Suite for Atmosphere

latest_release.body:
Compatible with Atmosphere 1.11.2

Installation : 
Download `EOS-Pro.7z` and extract it to the root of your SD card.
In `bootloader/hekate_ipl.ini` add `kip1=atmosphere/kips/loader.kip` right under `pkg3=` line.
Configure your desired OC settings in EOS-Pro Toolkit and reboot to apply the changes.

Can also use the [NX-Pro Pack](https://github.com/NaGaa95/NX-Pro-Pack) for AIO setup.

Notice :
Use it only with a NAND backup.
Unstable settings can lead to NAND corruption.

nagaa.name: freespace2_nx
nagaa.description: Freespace & Freespace 2 sources code (from Icculus) with added support for Pandora (ARM cpu and GLES rendering). Status: Working

latest_release.body:
## v1.0.0

- Initial release


INSTALL
-------

Create the folder  sdmc:/switch/freespace2/  on your SD card and put the .nro
and all of your game data together in it:

    sdmc:/switch/freespace2/
        freespace2.nro          <- this release
        root_fs2.vp             \
        sparky_fs2.vp            |  your FreeSpace 2 data
        sparky_hi_fs2.vp        |  (every *.vp file)
        ... (all other *.vp)    /
        Data/
            Movies/             <- cutscenes (*.mve), optional


CONFIGURATION
-------------

On first launch a config.txt is created next to the .nro :

    rumble = 1              (HD rumble: 1 = on, 0 = off)
    gyro = 0               (motion aiming while flying: 1 = on, 0 = off)
    gyro_sensitivity = 50   (gyro strength: 0-100)

CONTROLS
--------

    Left stick    Fly (pitch / roll)
    Right stick   Throttle / rudder       (menus: move cursor)
    A / ZR        Fire primary            (menus: select)
    B / ZL        Fire secondary          (menus: back)
    R             Afterburner
    X             Launch countermeasure
    Y             Target ship in reticle
    L             Target nearest enemy
    D-pad         Arrow keys
    +  (Plus)     Pause / in-mission menu
    -  (Minus)    On-screen keyboard (e.g. to enter a pilot name)

nagaa.name: hekate-pro
nagaa.description: hekate - A GUI based Nintendo Switch Bootloader

latest_release.body:
UNOFFICIAL HEKATE FORK. Do not report any issues with this to the Hekate maintainers.

#### UPDATE 09/04 :
- New update to fix a few issues, emuSD is now working again

## Features
- Support for emuMMC on eMMC
  *  Allows creating file or partition based emuMMC on the eMMC.
- Support for formatting the eMMC and resizing HOS USER partition
- Support for creating and installing Android and Linux on eMMC
- Support for emuSD
  * Allows redirecting all SD accesses in HOS to a separate file or partition on the SD card or eMMC. 
Note: HOS will crash, if no physical SD card is inserted
- Support for mounting file and partition based emuMMC and emuSD
- Support for arbitrary size emuMMC, file and partition based
- Support for booting without SD card
  * Hekate will check if there is a FAT32 filesystem on eMMC BOOT1 (at 1MB offset), eMMC BOOT1 (at 0MB offset), in any partition on the eMMC GPP or SD card. 
If there is no .no_boot_storage file present in the root folder, it will use that FAT32 partition to boot.
- 1250 VDD2 / 1300 VDD2Q Voltage Allowed on L4T / Android

## Added in 6.5.2 :
- Super5 OLED Support
  * Panel ID must be added into Android / L4T `boot.scr`
  * Can be downloaded here [Android](https://github.com/NaGaa95/LineageOS-OC-nx_tab/releases) / [Ubuntu-Noble](https://github.com/NaGaa95/L4T-OC-Kernel/releases)
- Kingston eMMC ID added
- memory_mode_auto support removed for newer memmode implementation


Recommended to use with [Atmosphere-Pro](https://github.com/NaGaa95/Atmosphere-Pro/releases) to access all features.

nagaa.description: Nintendo Switch port of https://github.com/fgsfdsfgs/max_vita

latest_release.body:
## v1.0.1

- Support for the new Max Payne Mobile update (v2.1.131)
- Video playback support
- Touchscreen support
  - can be disabled with `touchscreen 0` in config.txt
  - The on-screen touch HUD now hides while using a controller and
  reappears when you touch the screen
- CPU boost during loading screens (boot, new game, chapter changes,
  loading saves) for faster load times
- `show_fps 1` to enable FPS counter

nagaa.name: openmohaa_nx
nagaa.description: Open re-implementation of Medal of Honor: Allied Assault including Spearhead and Breakthrough expansions with modern features and bugfixes from ioquake3 with cross-platform support

latest_release.body:
## v0.83.0 - R2

- Fix mission transitions and cgame state
- Reduced Joystick sensitivity 

1. Copy `openmohaa.nro` to your SD card
   `sdmc:/switch/openmohaa/openmohaa.nro`
2. Copy the game data from your **legitimately owned** MOHAA install onto the SD
   card next to it:

   ```
   sdmc:/switch/openmohaa/main/pak0.pk3 … pakN.pk3      (Allied Assault, required)
   sdmc:/switch/openmohaa/mainta/…                       (Spearhead, optional)
   sdmc:/switch/openmohaa/maintt/…                       (Breakthrough, optional)
   ```

nagaa.name: vcmi_nx
nagaa.description: Open-source engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III

latest_release.body:
## How to Install

1. Copy `vcmiclient.nro` to `sdmc:/switch/vcmi/vcmiclient.nro`
2. Copy your **legally-owned Heroes III** data onto the SD card:
   ```
   sdmc:/switch/vcmi/Data/   (H3 .lod archives etc.)
   sdmc:/switch/vcmi/Maps/
   sdmc:/switch/vcmi/Mp3/
   ```
   Shadow of Death or Complete is required (Restoration of Erathia alone is not supported).
3. Saves and config are written under `sdmc:/switch/vcmi/`.
